title: Conductor Pipeline
description: Autonomous ticket-to-PR workflow — from GitHub issue through planning, implementation, review, and pull request creation.

nodes.label: /conductor start #N
nodes.tooltip: Developer triggers the conductor with a GitHub issue number. The conductor reads the issue, loads context, and begins the autonomous workflow.

nodes.label: plan-architect
nodes.tooltip: Reads the GitHub issue, analyzes the codebase, and generates a phased implementation plan with discrete tasks. Uses Opus for maximum reasoning depth.

nodes.label: task-executor
nodes.tooltip: Implements individual tasks from the plan. Expert skills are pre-loaded per task. Loops through all tasks in each phase.

nodes.label: phase-verifier
nodes.tooltip: Verifies each phase is complete and correct before advancing to the next. Runs quality checks at phase boundaries.

nodes.label: review-orchestrator
nodes.tooltip: Runs /preflight, /ui-test, and /a11y-audit quality gates. Produces review findings.

nodes.label: finding-resolver
nodes.tooltip: Creates atomic fix tasks from review findings and feeds them back to task-executor for remediation.

nodes.label: debug-investigator
nodes.tooltip: Deep 7-step investigation for tasks that fail 3 times. Uses Opus for maximum reasoning depth. Escalates to human via GitHub if still blocked.

nodes.label: pr-creator
nodes.tooltip: Creates the pull request with structured description, links to the GitHub issue, and moves the ticket on the kanban board.
